title: Pridestone - AroAce
description: A resource pack that modifies redstone to be AroAce themed using Cyanstone.
body:
# AroAce themed redstone
This changes redstone to be themed around AroAce pride using Cyanstone. This was designed to be fun while also functional with redstone, so part of the colors will be darker or lighter than what appears on the actual flag to know which side of the redstone dust is the most powered and the least powered.

This supports all versions of Cyanstone, but there might be "incompatible version" warning because of resource pack formats.
